title: M08 Mastery Check — AI Layer Integration

tasks.title: Write the LLMProvider Interface
tasks.prompt: Write the TypeScript LLMProvider interface and AnthropicProvider implementation skeleton. The interface must have complete and stream methods with correct TypeScript types. The AnthropicProvider must call logAuditEvent before making any API call.
success_criteria: logAuditEvent called before Anthropic API call in both methods

tasks.title: Fix the Memory Retrieval Query
success_criteria: Missing workspace_id in WHERE clause — must add AND workspace_id = {workspaceId}
Missing distance threshold — should add AND embedding <=> ... < 0.3 or filter results
Function signature must accept workspaceId parameter
